name: Glen Park
description: Glen Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in River Falls, WI. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Meyer Middle School
description: Meyer Middle School is a place to play pickleball in River Falls, WI. There are 10 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Public Square Park
description: Public Square Park is a place to play pickleball in Prescott, WI. There are 5 acrylic courts. 2 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are available. Players have access to restrooms and water.
